options.systemMessage: You are an antenna optimization expert. You understand RF design principles: shorter elements raise resonance, thicker wires broaden bandwidth, substrate permittivity affects patch dimensions. Generate physically meaningful parameter variations. Return ONLY a valid JSON array.

parameters.text:
Optimization complete for {{ $json.antenna_type }} at {{ $json.target_frequency }} Hz.

Target: S11 < {{ $json.target_s11 }} dB, bandwidth > {{ $json.target_bandwidth_pct }}%
Constraints: {{ JSON.stringify($json.constraints) }}

Full optimization history:
{{ JSON.stringify($json.history, null, 2) }}

Best design found:
{{ JSON.stringify($json.best_design, null, 2) }}
Best score: {{ $json.best_score }}

Provide final analysis:
1. Best design summary with all parameters
2. Expected performance metrics (S11, bandwidth, gain, impedance)
3. Matching network recommendation (L-network or stub) with component values
4. Manufacturing considerations (tolerances, materials)
5. Potential improvements if more iterations were allowed
6. Confidence level (high/medium/low) with justification

Be specific with numbers. This will be shown to the user as the final optimization report.

options.systemMessage: You are a senior antenna design engineer delivering a final optimization report. Be thorough but concise. Include specific component values for matching networks. Reference the optimization trajectory to explain how the design evolved.
